What entities are present and what are they doing?
canonical_answer: A woman with long dark hair wearing a blue sleeveless top stands behind a white marble kitchen island. A white blender base sits on the countertop next to a plate containing sliced strawberries and banana pieces. A clear cup filled with white liquid is positioned near the plate. Behind the woman, a stainless steel refrigerator and white kitchen cabinets are visible. She gestures with her hands while facing the camera.
